messages.content: hello
You haven't actually asked a question, Sir. What's on your mind?
what is artificial intelligence
Artificial intelligence refers to the development of computer systems that can perform tasks that typically require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving, and decision-making, Sir.
write Python program for create calculator
I'm working on the content writing in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
create a image of elephant
I'm working on the image generation in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
who created you
I was created by a team of developers, Sir.
do you know what is my name
You haven't shared your name with me, Sir. I only know you as "Sir" from our conversation.
my name is Bhanu Pratap Singh and my age is 21 years old
Nice to know that, Bhanu Pratap Singh. I'll keep that in mind for our conversation, Sir.
and I created you
I'm afraid that's not correct, Bhanu Pratap Singh. I was created by a team of developers, not by you, Sir.
which type of task you do
I can answer questions, open websites and apps, play music and videos, generate images, write content, search Google and YouTube, and analyze camera images, Bhanu Pratap Singh.
open YouTube and play maniac song
I've opened YouTube for you. I've started playing that for you.
open WhatsApp and send message to Vishu
I've opened WhatsApp for you.
write a application for today leaves
I'm working on the content writing in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
